# react-ascii-text

> React hook to render and animate ASCII text art using Figlet fonts. Works with React 17+, including Next.js App Router (`"use client"` is already set inside the package).

## Installation

```
npm install react-ascii-text
```

## Core API

### `useAsciiText(args: UseAsciiTextArgs): RefObject<HTMLPreElement>`

Returns a ref to attach to a `<pre>` element. Renders or animates ASCII art.

Pass a **single string** for a static render; pass an **array of strings** to animate transitions between them.

#### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `text` | `string \| string[]` | `["React","ASCII","Text"]` | Text to render. Array triggers animation. |
| `font` | `string` | Slant | Figlet font data (import from `react-ascii-text`). |
| `isAnimated` | `boolean` | `true` | Set `false` for a static render. |
| `isPaused` | `boolean` | `false` | Reactive — pause/resume the animation. |
| `animationCharacters` | `string` | `"/*+#"` | Characters used during the transition effect. |
| `animationCharacterSpacing` | `number` | `1` | Spacing between animation characters. |
| `animationDelay` | `number` | `500` | Pause in ms at the midpoint of each transition. |
| `animationDirection` | `AnimationDirection` | `"horizontal"` | `"up"`, `"down"`, `"left"`, `"right"`, `"horizontal"`, `"vertical"`. |
| `animationInterval` | `number` | `1000` | Gap in ms between consecutive animations. |
| `animationIteration` | `number` | `1` | How many times to repeat (ignored when `animationLoop` is `true`). |
| `animationLoop` | `boolean` | `true` | Loop indefinitely. |
| `animationSpeed` | `number` | `20` | Frame throttle in ms — lower = faster. |
| `fadeInOnly` | `boolean` | `false` | Only play the reveal half of the animation. |
| `fadeOutOnly` | `boolean` | `false` | Only play the hide half of the animation. |

#### Types

```typescript
import type { UseAsciiTextArgs, AnimationDirection } from 'react-ascii-text';
```

## Fonts

328 Figlet fonts are bundled. Import them by their camelCase name:

```typescript
import { alligator, slant, threeD, bigMoneySw } from 'react-ascii-text';
```

Font names follow this conversion rule: spaces and hyphens are removed and the result is camelCased. For example, `"Big Money-sw"` → `bigMoneySw`, `"3-D"` → `threeD`, `"5 Line Oblique"` → `fiveLineOblique`.

Full font list and interactive preview: https://patorjk.com/software/taag/

## Usage Examples

### Static render

```tsx
import { useAsciiText, alligator } from 'react-ascii-text';

function Hero() {
  const ref = useAsciiText({ font: alligator, text: "Hello, World!" });
  return <pre ref={ref} />;
}
```

### Animated loop

```tsx
import { useAsciiText, alligator } from 'react-ascii-text';

function AnimatedHero() {
  const ref = useAsciiText({
    font: alligator,
    text: ["REACT", "ASCII", "TEXT"],
    animationDirection: "down",
    animationCharacters: "▒░█",
    animationCharacterSpacing: 1,
    animationDelay: 2000,
    animationInterval: 100,
    animationLoop: true,
    animationSpeed: 30,
  });
  return <pre ref={ref} />;
}
```

### Pause / resume

```tsx
import { useAsciiText, slant } from 'react-ascii-text';

function PausableHero({ paused }: { paused: boolean }) {
  const ref = useAsciiText({
    font: slant,
    text: ["A", "B", "C"],
    isPaused: paused,
  });
  return <pre ref={ref} />;
}
```

### Static text (no animation)

```tsx
import { useAsciiText, doom } from 'react-ascii-text';

function StaticBanner() {
  const ref = useAsciiText({ font: doom, text: "DOOM", isAnimated: false });
  return <pre ref={ref} />;
}
```

## Notes for AI agents

- Always attach the returned ref to a `<pre>` element, not a `<div>` or any other element.
- Fonts must be imported from `react-ascii-text` and passed as the `font` prop — do not pass a font name string.
- The package already includes `"use client"` so it is safe to use in Next.js App Router without adding the directive yourself.
- Tree-shaking is supported: only the font modules you import will be included in the bundle.
- The hook is browser-only (uses `requestAnimationFrame`). SSR renders nothing until the client hydrates.

## Links

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/react-ascii-text
- GitHub: https://github.com/samuelweckstrom/react-ascii-text
- Demo: https://samuel.weckstrom.dev/react-ascii-text
